hero.headline: One quality system built for BLA-stage GMP
hero.subtext: Connect your controlled documents, CAPA workflows, and LIMS data in a single audit-ready environment as you scale toward BLA-enabling activities.

pageTitle: Meridian Therapeutics QMS — BLA-Ready Quality Operations

emptyStates.generic: No records yet. Controlled documents, CAPAs, and lot data will appear here once ingested from your connected systems.
emptyStates.documents: No controlled documents found. Documents migrated from MasterControl or your legacy eQMS will appear here.
emptyStates.capas: No CAPA records yet. Open and closed CAPAs from your connected systems will populate this view.
emptyStates.lots: No lot records ingested. LIMS batch and lot data will appear here once your integration is configured.

footer.tagline: Built for pre-commercial biotechs navigating the early- to late-stage GMP transition.
footer.companyContext: Supporting Meridian Therapeutics as you advance toward BLA-enabling activities.

problemContext.summary: Quality operations fragmented across MasterControl, legacy eQMS, and LIMS — creating audit risk as BLA activities approach.
painPoints: Fragmented controlled document management across systems
CAPA workflows disconnected from deviation and lot records
Audit readiness gaps during early-to-late-stage GMP transition
BLA-enabling timeline pressure (~18 months) with unintegrated quality data
